description: Create SMS inbox, Chat agent panel, Visitor tracking dashboard, and E-signature management pages - 4 module UIs for communication and document features. These are app/tenant/ level pages (not settings).
steps: Create app/tenant/sms/page.tsx - 'use client' page with SMS inbox showing sent/received messages (to, body/template, status, timestamp). Compose new SMS form with to/body fields and template selection. Fetches from /api/tenant/sms. Include loading.tsx and error.tsx.

Create app/tenant/chat/page.tsx - 'use client' agent panel showing active chat sessions list (visitor name, status, channel, created time). Click session to expand messages (fetch from /api/tenant/chat/[sessionId]/messages). Include loading.tsx and error.tsx.

Create app/tenant/visitors/page.tsx - 'use client' dashboard showing visitors table (IP, pages viewed, score, identified contact link). Filter by identified/anonymous, min/max score. Fetches from /api/tenant/visitors. Include loading.tsx and error.tsx.

Create app/tenant/esignature/page.tsx - 'use client' page listing signing requests (document, signers count, provider, status, created date). Create signing request modal (document ID, signers array, provider selection). Fetches from /api/tenant/esignature. Include loading.tsx and error.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 pages render without TypeScript errors
Each page has loading.tsx and error.tsx
SMS page supports viewing messages and composing new ones (direct body or template)
Chat page shows sessions and messages within sessions
Visitors page supports filter by identified/anonymous and score range
E-signature page shows list and supports creating new signing requests
verification: npm run build - succeeds with all 4 new pages compiled
findings: All 4 pages + 12 files total created successfully. tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors. npm run build succeeds with all 4 new routes compiled (/tenant/sms, /tenant/chat, /tenant/visitors, /tenant/esignature). Used getStatusConfig helper in chat page to avoid TS4111 index signature errors. Used typed payload object in SMS page instead of Record<string,unknown> to satisfy strict mode.
